Home
Fence Installation
Temporary Fence Installation




Temporary Fence Installation for Your Project Needs

BlueBird Fence Inc offers professional temporary fence installation services to meet your short-term fencing requirements. Our temporary fencing solutions are ideal for construction sites, events, and areas that need secure boundaries during project completion. We understand the importance of flexibility and security in temporary fencing, and our team is ready to provide you with the perfect solution. Our services include:




Construction site security
Event perimeter fencing
Crowd control barriers
Temporary pool fencing
Emergency fencing solutions
Site safety compliance


Contact BlueBird Fence to discuss your temporary fencing needs and receive a tailored solution for your project.


Why You May Need Temporary Fence Installation

Temporary fencing serves various crucial purposes across different industries and situations. Understanding when and why you might need temporary fencing can help you make informed decisions for your project or event. Some top uses of temporary fencing include:




Ensure site safety and security
Comply with local regulations and insurance requirements
Protect valuable equipment and materials
Define work zones and restrict access
Manage crowd flow at events
Provide temporary property boundaries
Safeguard excavation areas
Create temporary animal enclosures


Whether you're managing a construction project, organizing an event, or need short-term security measures, temporary fencing offers a versatile and efficient solution. Reach out to BlueBird Fence to explore how our temporary fencing services can benefit your specific needs.


Why Choose BlueBird Fence

When it comes to temporary fence installation, BlueBird Fence stands out as the premier choice in the greater Boston Metro area. Our commitment to quality, customer satisfaction, and professional service sets us apart from the competition. Some of the top benefits of choosing us include:




100% satisfaction guaranteed
24/7 emergency service availability
Established in 2012 with a proven track record
Financing options to suit your budget
Free same-day estimates for quick project starts
Fully licensed fencing contractors ensuring compliance
Highly reviewed by satisfied customers
Skilled installers with extensive experience
Local, family- and minority-owned business
Most installations completed in 1-2 weeks
Labor and material warranties vary by project 
Over 30 years of combined industry experience
Competitive pricing with a price match guarantee
Assistance with obtaining necessary building permits
Responsive communication, same-day email replies during business hours


Choose BlueBird Fence for your temporary fencing needs and experience the difference that comes with working with a dedicated, professional team. Our commitment to excellence ensures that your temporary fencing project will be handled with the utmost care and efficiency.


Contact Us

Ready to secure your site or event with reliable temporary fencing? BlueBird Fence is here to help. Our team of fencing professionals is ready to assist you with your temporary fence installation needs. We serve the greater Boston Metro area and are committed to providing you with the highest quality service and products.


Don't let security concerns or compliance issues delay your project. Get in touch with BlueBird Fence today to discuss your temporary fencing requirements and receive a customized solution that meets your specific needs. Our friendly staff is waiting to answer your questions and provide you with a free, same-day estimate.

How quickly can BlueBird Fence install temporary fencing?
BlueBird Fence can typically install temporary fencing within 1-2 weeks of your request. However, for urgent needs, we offer 24/7 emergency services and can often accommodate faster installation times. Contact us for a precise timeline based on your specific requirements.
What types of temporary fencing does BlueBird Fence offer?
We offer a variety of temporary fencing options suitable for different needs, including chain-link fences, panel fences, crowd control barriers, and construction site fencing. Our team can recommend the best type based on your project's specific requirements, duration, and security needs.
Is a permit required for temporary fence installation in the Boston Metro area?
Permit requirements for temporary fencing can vary depending on the specific location, duration, and purpose of the fence within the Boston Metro area. BlueBird Fence assists with obtaining necessary permits and ensures compliance with local regulations. We'll guide you through the process and handle the paperwork to make your temporary fence installation as smooth as possible.
